    def test_negative_scenario_valid_email_invalid_password(self, setup):

        page = LoginPage(driver)
        page.click_login()
    
        page.enter_user_details("vimalcedric26@gmail.com","test@091124")
        page.submit_login()
    
        expected_url = "https://www.guvi.in/sign-in/"
        actual_url = driver.current_url
    
        assert expected_url != actual_url, "URLs should not match"
